title: Lenovo's premium Yoga Slim 7x Copilot+ laptop with a 'phenomenal OLED display' is over $420 off at Best Buy
summary: Powered by Qualcomm Snapdragon X Elite 12-core processor, this laptop pairs 16GB LPDDR5X memory with a 512GB SSD, 14.5-inch 2944x1840 touchscreen, Windows 11 Pro, integrated graphics, backlit keyboard, weighing 2.9 pounds.
